---
title: "Henry William Salmon"
---

## Henry William Salmon

**Dates:** (1859-1940)

### Description

photographer, of 77 High Street, Winchester

### Biography

The City of Winchester Trust holds many Salmon photographs in its archive.

### Letters

- [To Frederick Orridge Macmillan, June 28th1898](../letters/3376_To_Frederick_Orridge_Macmillan.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
